user.title: Daystrom Server
user.description: Connect to your Daystrom data server. This is where all plant and plot data is stored.

weather.title: Weather Entity
weather.description: Choose any HA entity that surfaces current weather. Agribuddy reads its state for rain/snow detection and its attributes for frost forecasting.

ai_provider.title: AI Fallback Provider (optional)
ai_provider.description:
Configure an OpenAI-compatible API as a fallback for plant varieties not found in the built-in CSV database. Any endpoint that supports chat completions works (OpenAI, Ollama, LM Studio, etc.).

Leave blank to skip.

error.daystrom_connect_failed: Cannot connect to Daystrom. Check the URL and ensure the server is running.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — see HA logs for details.
